This is the first year of reporting.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: The facility has several pollution prevention programs which are reviewed and updated at least annually. These plant-specific programs include waste reduction, land application of treated industrial wastewater, air emission controls and sustainability metrics for plant inputs (water, natural gas, electricity). We continually make documented efforts to seek efficiencies and implement improvements for all areas of the plant.
